checkers.test:
assert clamp_all([3, -7, 12, 5], 0, 10) == [3, 0, 10, 5]
assert clamp_all([], -5, 5) == []
assert clamp_all([4, 4, 4], 4, 4) == [4, 4, 4]
assert clamp_all([-2, -1, 0, 1, 2], -1, 1) == [-1, -1, 0, 1, 1]
assert clamp_all([100], -50, 50) == [50]
assert clamp_all([0.5, 2.5], 1, 2) == [1, 2]
_orig = [9, -9, 3]
_out = clamp_all(_orig, 0, 5)
assert _orig == [9, -9, 3], 'input list was mutated'
assert _out == [5, 0, 3]

assert count_token("red blue red green red", "red") == 3
assert count_token("", "red") == 0
assert count_token("redred red", "red") == 1
assert count_token("  spaced   out   spaced ", "spaced") == 2
assert count_token("Red red RED", "red") == 1
assert count_token("a\tb\na b", "b") == 2
